extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract PDF Text to UTF-8 File using PdfExtractor
extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving it to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

check-pdf-text-only-by-detecting-images.title: Check if PDF Is Text‑Only by Detecting Images
check-pdf-text-only-by-detecting-images.description: The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to bind a PDF, extract its images, and then checks HasNextImage to determine whether any images are present, indicating the document is not text‑only.

retry-pdf-text-extraction.title: Retry PDF Text Extraction with PdfExtractor
retry-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor with a retry loop that handles IOException and retries up to three times.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract both text and images from a PDF file in a single run.

extract-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.title: Extract PDF Images to JPEG (Quality 85)
extract-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF and saving them as JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter with a JPEG quality setting of 85 to balance file size and clarity.

extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to provide a user password to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and extract all images from an encrypted PDF document.

extract-text-from-pdf-and-encrypt-aes.title: Extract Text from PDF and Encrypt with AES
extract-text-from-pdf-and-encrypt-aes.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then encrypting the resulting .txt file with AES‑256 CBC using a password‑derived key.

count-pages-images-attachments-pdf.title: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments in a PDF
count-pages-images-attachments-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to obtain the total number of pages, embedded images, and file attachments in a PDF document.

extract-images-from-first-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
extract-images-from-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to pull all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

extract-pdf-pages-as-png-thumbnails.title: Extract PDF Pages as PNG Thumbnails
extract-pdf-pages-as-png-thumbnails.description: Shows how to extract each page of a PDF as a PNG thumbnail with a maximum size of 200 × 200 pixels using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-images-pdf-to-word.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed into Word Document
extract-images-pdf-to-word.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF file and insert them into a DOCX using the Open XML SDK.

extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image with a unique GUID‑based filename to avoid naming collisions.

extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts each image on every page, saves them as PNG files, and generates a CSV file listing the image file name, page number, and dimensions.

extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by File Extension
extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save them into subfolders grouped by their original file extensions.

check-pdf-contains-text.title: Check if PDF Contains Text via MemoryStream
check-pdf-contains-text.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract text into a MemoryStream and determine whether a PDF file has any textual content.

extract-text-from-password-protected-pdf.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
extract-text-from-password-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to supply the owner password to PdfExtractor, decrypt a protected PDF, and extract its text to a file.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder
extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, store it in a StringBuilder for further manipulation, and then write the processed text to a file.

extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet PNG
extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and merge them into a single horizontal sprite sheet PNG with PdfConverter.

extract-pdf-images-to-s3-with-sse.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to S3 with SSE
extract-pdf-images-to-s3-with-sse.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, saves them as temporary PNG files, and uploads each image to an Amazon S3 bucket with server‑side AES‑256 encryption.

extract-text-from-pdfs-using-pdfextracto.title: Extract Text from PDFs Using Aspose PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdfs-using-pdfextracto.description: Demonstrates a .NET console service that extracts text from PDF files with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, handling input/output directories via environment variables and fallback temporary folders.

extract-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
extract-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and write the result to the console.

check-pdf-for-text-and-images.title: Check PDF for Both Text and Images
check-pdf-for-text-and-images.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains at least one text element and at least one image.

extract-text-to-memorystream-generate-pd.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream and Generate New PDF
extract-text-to-memorystream-generate-pd.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF into a MemoryStream using PdfExtractor, then read the stream to create a new PDF with Aspose.Pdf core API.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter for Logging
extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, capture it in a MemoryStream, and write the result to a StringWriter for integration with logging frameworks.

extract-pdf-text-to-temp-file-verify.title: Extract PDF Text to Temporary File and Verify Content
extract-pdf-text-to-temp-file-verify.description: The example extracts all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, writes it to a temporary Unicode text file, reads the file back, and verifies that the extracted text matches the saved content.

extract-first-three-pages-summary-pdf.title: Extract First Three Pages Text and Create Summary PDF
extract-first-three-pages-summary-pdf.description: Shows how to extract text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor (Facades API) and generate a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary.

extract-pdf-text-azure-function.title: Extract PDF Text via Azure Queue Trigger
extract-pdf-text-azure-function.description: Shows an Azure Function that triggers on a storage queue, downloads a PDF blob, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and uploads the extracted text as a .txt blob.

configurable-pdf-extraction.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
configurable-pdf-extraction.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration to toggle extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor without modifying the code.

extract-images-to-tiff.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as TIFF
extract-images-to-tiff.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and save each one as a lossless TIFF file for archival storage.

extract-text-from-pdf-bytes.title: Extract Text from PDF Bytes Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-bytes.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF stored in a byte array to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extracting its text entirely in memory, and handling platform‑specific GDI+ issues with a fallback PDF.

extract-images-validate-signature.title: Extract Images from PDF and Validate File Signatures
extract-images-validate-signature.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving them to disk, and verifying their integrity by checking magic numbers (file signatures).

extract-pdf-images-as-bmp.title: Extract PDF Images and Save as BMP
extract-pdf-images-as-bmp.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as BMP files while preserving the original resolution and color depth.

extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and then upload each image to an Azure Blob container.

extract-images-from-pdf-using-pdfextract.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
extract-images-from-pdf-using-pdfextract.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor inside a using block to extract all images from a PDF and save them as JPEG files.

extract-pdf-attachments.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
extract-pdf-attachments.description: Shows how to extract embedded file attachments from a PDF document and write each one to a specified output folder using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF, extract its plain text with UTF‑8 encoding, and save the result to a .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-page-by-page.title: Extract PDF Text Page by Page
extract-pdf-text-page-by-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the text of each PDF page and save it to separate .txt files.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs-azure-blob.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF files in an Azure Blob container, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and upload the resulting .txt files back to another container.

extract-resource-defined-images.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
extract-resource-defined-images.description: Demonstrates how to set the ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and use PdfExtractor to retrieve and save images embedded as resources in a PDF document.

pdf-extractor-text-extraction-unit-test.title: PdfExtractor Text Extraction Unit Test
pdf-extractor-text-extraction-unit-test.description: Shows how to create a temporary PDF with known text, extract that text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and verify the result with an NUnit assertion.

extract-images-to-unc-share.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-to-unc-share.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them to a UNC network share directory.

extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array with Aspose.Pdf
extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF file into a byte array, bind it to a MemoryStream, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the document text and return it as JSON.

extract-images-original-format.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
extract-images-original-format.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF while preserving their original file format.

extract-pdf-text-with-cancellation.title: Extract PDF Text with Cancellation Support
extract-pdf-text-with-cancellation.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF page‑by‑page while honoring a CancellationToken to abort the operation.

extract-text-from-pdf-using-pdfextractor.title: Extract Text from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-using-pdfextractor.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and output the result to the console.

extract-pdf-images-add-watermark.title: Extract PDF Images and Add Watermark
extract-pdf-images-add-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, apply a semi‑transparent text watermark to each image, and save the results as PNG files.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and save them into a uniquely created temporary directory.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Extracts all file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, saves each attachment to disk, and calculates a SHA-256 hash to verify its integrity.

extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and uploading each image to an Amazon S3 bucket via the AWS SDK.

extract-images-by-keyword.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
extract-images-by-keyword.description: Shows how to scan each PDF page for a specific keyword and, when the keyword is found, extract all images from that page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-text-to-postgres.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
extract-pdf-text-to-postgres.description: Demonstrates how to extract Unicode text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and insert the extracted content into a PostgreSQL table for searchable indexing.

extract-images-from-pdf-csv.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
extract-images-from-pdf-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from each PDF page, save them as PNG files, and produce a CSV file with image filenames, page numbers, and dimensions.

extract-text-only-from-pdf.title: Extract Text Only from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-only-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content from a PDF while ignoring images by omitting the ExtractImage call.

list-embedded-attachment-names.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
list-embedded-attachment-names.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfExtractor, extract its attachments, and retrieve the names of all embedded files without saving them.

extract-text-from-pdf-pages-with-progres.title: Extract Text from PDF Pages with Progress Reporting
extract-text-from-pdf-pages-with-progres.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a PDF while reporting progress to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-azure-table.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
extract-pdf-text-to-azure-table.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save the extracted content as an Azure Table entity with the document ID as the partition key.

async-pdf-extraction.title: Asynchronous PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
async-pdf-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text, images, and embedded attachments from a PDF file asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to keep UI threads responsive.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-zip.title: Extract Images from PDF to ZIP Archive
extract-images-from-pdf-to-zip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images out of a PDF and then package those images into a ZIP file.

extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page by setting the PdfExtractor's StartPage and EndPage to the same value.

extract-pdf-images-base64.title: Extract PDF Images and Return as Base64 JSON
extract-pdf-images-base64.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converting each image to a Base64 string, and serializing the collection to a JSON array.

extract-images-markdown-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate Markdown Gallery
extract-images-markdown-gallery.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, save them as PNG files, and create a Markdown file that displays the images as a gallery.

handle-errors-binding-corrupted-pdf.title: Handle Errors When Binding a Corrupted PDF with PdfExtractor
handle-errors-binding-corrupted-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to catch specific Aspose.Pdf exceptions thrown when PdfExtractor fails to bind a corrupted PDF file, providing detailed error messages.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a folder of PDF files, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each document, and save the output as .txt files with matching filenames.

extract-images-to-html-report.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
extract-images-to-html-report.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and embed them as base64 data URIs in an HTML file.

extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and writing them to a network‑mapped UNC folder.

extract-all-images-from-pdf.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract every image from a PDF document by setting the page range to all pages and iterating through the extracted images with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a directory and write each result to a corresponding .txt file.

extract-images-ocr-openai.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI
extract-images-ocr-openai.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and then applying Aspose.Pdf.AI OCR via OpenAI to retrieve hidden text from each image.

verify-image-extraction-mode-count.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Affects Extracted Image Count
verify-image-extraction-mode-count.description: Creates a PDF with two images and uses PdfExtractor with different ExtractImageMode settings to ensure the extraction mode influences the number of images returned, demonstrated via an NUnit unit test.

extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZipStream, creating a compressed .txt.gz file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.description: Demonstrates how to configure PdfExtractor to extract only images from pages 5‑10 of a PDF and save each extracted image as a PNG file.

extract-images-create-portfolio-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Portfolio PDF
extract-images-create-portfolio-pdf.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a source PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and assembling them into a new PDF portfolio where each image occupies its own page.

parallel-extraction-of-images-from-multi.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
parallel-extraction-of-images-from-multi.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

extract-images-create-pdfa2b.title: Extract Images and Create PDF/A‑2b Document
extract-images-create-pdfa2b.description: Shows how to extract images from a PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on a new page, and convert the resulting document to PDF/A‑2b compliance.

extract-images-from-pdf-and-compress-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Compress PNGs
extract-images-from-pdf-and-compress-png.description: The example demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF, save them as PNG files, and then compress each PNG using GZip for lossless compression.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-gcs.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
extract-images-from-pdf-to-gcs.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and then upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read permissions.

extract-pdf-attachments-rename-timestamp.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Rename with Timestamp
extract-pdf-attachments-rename-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to extract all attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then save each file with a unique timestamp‑based name.

extract-images-pdf-to-base64-json.title: Extract Images from PDF to Base64 JSON
extract-images-pdf-to-base64-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert them to Base64 strings, and save the data with metadata in a JSON file.

extract-pdf-images-create-video-slidesho.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
extract-pdf-images-create-video-slidesho.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, saves them as PNG files, and then assembles them into a video slideshow with FFmpeg.

create-contact-sheet-pdf.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF from Extracted Images
create-contact-sheet-pdf.description: Extracts all images from a source PDF and generates a new PDF that displays those images as thumbnails arranged in a grid layout.

extract-pdf-text-page-by-page-progress.title: Extract PDF Text Page‑by‑Page with Progress Indicator
extract-pdf-text-page-by-page-progress.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract each PDF page's text into separate files while displaying a real‑time progress percentage.

extract-pdf-images-html-gallery.title: Extract PDF Images and Build HTML Gallery
extract-pdf-images-html-gallery.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generate a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images.
